sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113652" key="xeiromaxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-μᾰχέω</orth>, <sense id="n113652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fight with the hands,</tr_> sens. obsc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.22</biblScope> </bibl> (Scyth.).</sense> </entryFree>
